cut_off_times.gate_closes: 6Hrs prior ETA / SSR till 3Hrs after ETA

general_notes: We request you to review the specific parameters, viz. Service Contract, Price Owner, Named account customer and Commodity description. In case there are any changes required to these parameters, please send us a request before any containers(s) are picked
Thank you for placing your booking with Maersk A/S, as Carrier

online_solutions.name: New Finance & Tax Platform
online_solutions.description: Use the below link for a Step-by-Step guide to “Paid to Release” and “Delivery Option” on Maersk.com

compliance_and_sanctions.general_statement: This booking confirmation is subject to compliance with Maersk policy on shipments to Russia (available on maersk.com) and UN, EU and US sanction and export control laws, including US and EU sanctions laws applicable to Russia (Sanctions).
compliance_and_sanctions.shipper_representation: By proceeding, shipper represents that this booking in no way is in violation of Maersk policy on shipments to Russia, that the shipment does not involve, nor shall it involve, in either context directly or indirectly, in any way any entity or person subject to Sanctions, including any entity or person subject to Sanctions relating to Russia and that this booking does not involve any items prohibited by Sanctions for import to Russia.
compliance_and_sanctions.violation_consequences: If this shipment is in violation of Maersk policy on shipments to Russia, any entity or person involved in this booking is an entity or person subject to Sanctions or any items in this booking are prohibited for import to Russia by Sanctions, the shipment will be returned to origin without exception, and shipper is responsible for all cost and risk for such return.
compliance_and_sanctions.carrier_right_to_withhold_release: Shipper agrees that Carrier may withhold release of cargo pending investigation to determine if the booking is in violation of Sanctions.
compliance_and_sanctions.merchant_warranties: The Merchant(s) warrant and represent that this shipment and/or Goods will comply at all times with European Union, United States and United Nations sanctions and export control laws (Sanctions Laws), and that this shipment and/or Goods does not involve, whether directly or indirectly, any entity or person identified, or owned or controlled by any such entity or person identified, on the U.S. Treasury Departments Office of Foreign Asset Control (OFAC) list of Specially Designated Nationals and Blocked Persons, or any other similar list maintained by the European Union, or as promulgated by the United Nations Security Council (Designated Person).
compliance_and_sanctions.russian_origin_steel_iron_prohibition: the shipment and/or Goods do not involve any products that incorporate Russian origin steel or iron inputs, whether or not the shipment and/or Goods are processed and/or transhipped in any third country.

general_terms_and_conditions.document_subject_to: This document is subject to following:
general_terms_and_conditions.tariff_rates_condition: The shipment is subject to tariff rates unless a correct and applicable service contract number is available
general_terms_and_conditions.vessel_substitution_right: The carrier's right to substitute the named and/or performing vessel(s) with another vessel or vessels at any time.
general_terms_and_conditions.estimated_times_disclaimer: Arrival, berthing, departure and transit times are estimated and given without guarantee and subject to change without prior notice - All dates/times are given as reasonable estimates only and subject to change without prior notice.
general_terms_and_conditions.usa_shipments_requirements: Shipments destined for or carried/transhipped via the USA: - This document is given subject to the customer providing the correct cargo description in accordance with U.S. law, including U.S. Customs requirements as described in Customs Rules and Regulations, 19 CFR Parts 4, 113 and 178 of October 31, 2002

price_calculation_date_definitions.non_fmc_shipments: For Non-FMC shipments, PCD is the Estimated Time of Departure (ETD) of the first vessel in the latest booking confirmation issued upon customer request.
price_calculation_date_definitions.fmc_shipments: For FMC shipments, PCD is the date on which Maersk Line A/S or one of its authorised agent(s) takes possession of the last container listed on the transport document.
price_calculation_date_definitions.fmc_regulated_trades_note: FMC regulated trades are shipments exiting or entering a port in the United States, Guam, US Virgin Islands, American Samoa or Puerto Rico (US).
